skill.name: segment-automation
skill.description: Automate Segment tasks via Rube MCP (Composio): track events, identify users, manage groups, page views, aliases, batch operations. Always search tools first for current schemas.
skill.summary: Automate Segment CDP operations via Rube MCP for tracking events, user identification, group management, and batch operations.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: All static findings are false positives. The skill is legitimate Segment CDP automation documentation. The 73 flagged 'external_commands' are simply markdown tool references (backtick-formatted tool names like RUBE_SEARCH_TOOLS), not actual shell execution. The 'network' flag points to a legitimate MCP server configuration URL. Other flags ('weak cryptographic algorithm', 'system reconnaissance') are misclassifications of data privacy warnings about PII handling.

content.value_statement: Automate customer data platform operations in Segment including event tracking, user identification, group management, and batch processing through Rube MCP integration.
actual_capabilities: Track events to Segment for downstream analytics destinations
Identify users and associate traits with user profiles
Group users with companies, teams, or organizations
Send page view events for server-side tracking
Alias anonymous users to identified users
Execute batch operations for efficient bulk data ingestion
limitations: Requires active Rube MCP connection with Segment toolkit enabled
Cannot manage Segment sources without proper authentication
Batch size is limited by Segment API constraints
Does not provide real-time data delivery status to destinations

use_cases.title: E-commerce Event Tracking
use_cases.description: Send purchase events, cart updates, and product views to Segment for analytics and marketing automation

use_cases.title: SaaS User Profile Management
use_cases.description: Identify users with traits like plan type, company size, and usage metrics for customer success workflows
use_cases.target_user: SaaS product teams managing customer data

use_cases.title: Bulk Data Migration
use_cases.description: Import historical event data and user profiles in batches for data warehouse synchronization

prompt_templates.title: Basic Event Tracking
prompt_templates.prompt: Track a 'Button Clicked' event for userId 'user_123' with properties { button_name: 'signup', page: 'home' } using the Segment automation skill.
prompt_templates.scenario: Send a single event to Segment

prompt_templates.title: User Identification
prompt_templates.prompt: Identify user 'user_456' with traits { email: 'user@example.com', plan: 'pro', company_size: 50 } using Segment automation.

prompt_templates.title: Group Association
prompt_templates.prompt: Group user 'user_789' with group 'org_555' and traits { name: 'Acme Corp', industry: 'technology' } using Segment.

prompt_templates.title: Batch Operations
prompt_templates.prompt: Send a batch of 50 track events and 10 identify calls to Segment. Include various event types like 'Page Viewed', 'Button Clicked', and 'Order Completed' with appropriate properties.

output_examples.output: Event 'Order Completed' sent successfully to Segment with properties { order_id: '12345', total: 99.99, currency: 'USD' }. Response: { success: true, messageId: 'msg_abc123' }
User profile updated with traits { email: 'user@example.com', plan: 'enterprise', created_at: '2024-01-15' }. Response: { success: true }
Batch of 50 messages processed. 50 succeeded, 0 failed. Individual message IDs returned for successful calls.

best_practices: Always call RUBE_SEARCH_TOOLS first to get current tool schemas before executing workflows
Use batch operations for multiple events to stay within rate limits
Include both userId and anonymousId when possible for better identity resolution
Follow Segment naming conventions: 'Object Action' for events, snake_case for properties
anti_patterns: Sending PII in traits without verifying destination configuration for privacy compliance
Omitting userId or anonymousId from track calls, causing orphaned events
Calling ALIAS multiple times for the same user identity merge
Ignoring batch response errors assuming all messages succeeded

faq.question: What is Rube MCP?
faq.answer: Rube MCP is a Model Context Protocol server provided by Composio that enables AI tools to interact with various services including Segment.

faq.question: Do I need API keys for Segment?
faq.answer: No API keys needed for Rube MCP setup. You only need to authenticate with your Segment account through the OAuth flow when connecting.

faq.question: Can I track events without a userId?
faq.answer: Yes, you can use anonymousId instead. At least one of userId or anonymousId is required for each call.

faq.question: How many events can I send in a batch?
faq.answer: Batch size is limited by Segment API constraints. Check the current schema via RUBE_SEARCH_TOOLS for the exact limit.

faq.question: Is the data delivered to destinations immediately?
faq.answer: No, successful API responses indicate acceptance, not delivery. Data is processed asynchronously by Segment.

faq.question: Can I remove traits from a user profile?
faq.answer: Yes, set the trait to null in an identify call to remove it from the user profile.
